'''falate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yebo|yebo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yebo|yebo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| falate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:falate|falate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:falatesher|falatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:falatesherĂ«m|falatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:falatero|falatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:falateshĂ«|falateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:falateshĂ«m|falateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifalatero|gokifalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifalateshĂ«|gokifalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifalateshĂ«m|gokifalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofalankerom|gofalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofalankeshĂ«|gofalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofalankeshĂ«m|gofalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofalankeya|gofalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:falaterom|falaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:falatemu|falatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:falateya|falateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifalaterom|gokifalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifalatemu|gokifalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifalateya|gokifalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:falalate|falalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:falalatesher|falalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:falalatesherĂ«m|falalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:falalatero|falalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:falalateshĂ«|falalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:falalateshĂ«m|falalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifalalatero|gokifalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifalalateshĂ«|gokifalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifalalateshĂ«m|gokifalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofalalankerom|gofalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofalalankeshĂ«|gofalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofalalankeshĂ«m|gofalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofalalankeya|gofalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:falalaterom|falalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:falalatemu|falalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:falalateya|falalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifalalaterom|gokifalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifalalatemu|gokifalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifalalateya|gokifalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠlĂŠte|fĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠlĂŠtesher|fĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠlĂŠtero|fĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠlĂŠtero|gokifĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠlĂŠteya|fĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠlĂŠteya|gokifĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:faflafte|faflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:faflaftesher|faflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:faflaftesherĂ«m|faflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:faflaftero|faflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:faflafteshĂ«|faflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:faflafteshĂ«m|faflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifaflaftero|gokifaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifaflafteshĂ«|gokifaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifaflafteshĂ«m|gokifaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofaflafnkerom|gofaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofaflafnkeshĂ«|gofaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofaflafnkeshĂ«m|gofaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofaflafnkeya|gofaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:faflafterom|faflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:faflaftemu|faflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:faflafteya|faflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifaflafterom|gokifaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifaflaftemu|gokifaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifaflafteya|gokifaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
